columns.name: course_description
columns.description: Briefly describes the key thematic intersections and academic focus of the course, particularly emphasizing interdisciplinary aspects.

columns.name: course_title
columns.description: Title of the course, providing an overview of its content and emphasis.

columns.name: credits
columns.description: Number of academic credits earned upon successful completion of the course.

columns.name: department
columns.description: The academic department offering the course, e.g., Math, Economics.

columns.name: course_title
columns.description: Title of the course indicating its academic focus.

columns.name: instructor_name
columns.description: Unique identifier of the instructor or faculty member teaching the course.

columns.name: offering_year
columns.description: Year in which the course is scheduled or conducted.

columns.name: semester
columns.description: Academic term during which the course is offered, such as 'Fall 2006'.

columns.name: annual_salary
columns.description: Annual salary received by the instructor, reflecting their role and responsibilities.

columns.name: department
columns.description: Department within the institution where the instructor teaches.
